Confidential Non-Binding Term Sheet — proposed acquisition of 51% of Nova Tactile Holdings Limited (HKEX: NTHL) by Harbor Peak Capital Partners Ltd. and Blue Fern Holdings Ltd.; subject to SFC/HKEX approvals and the Takeovers Code.
Inside information under Part XIVA SFO until publication of a Rule 3.5 announcement on HKEX; price-sensitive and not for onward distribution.
Consideration: HK$5.80 per share in cash; total cap HK$1,160,000,000; funded by Harbor Peak Fund IV, L.P. (Cayman) and a committed facility from JadeBank HK (term sheet dated 2026-05-24).
Conditions: SFC executive clearance, HKEX Listing Rule 14 conditionality, no material adverse change in NTHL’s consolidated EBITDA; this paragraph is not a MAC definition and should not be construed as one.
Key person cluster (for coordination): Mr. Adrian K. Lau (DOB 1985-02-03; age 41), VP Corporate Development at Harbor Peak Capital Partners Ltd., based at Harbor View Centre, Tower B, Central, Hong Kong.
Contact for diligence scheduling: adrian.lau@harborpeakcap.hk; alt a d r i a n . l a u @ h a r b o r p e a k c a p . h k; device ref hk-iphone12-8XY993; VPN session hk-vpn-2026-05-24T08:13Z; client acct 4029-77 at JadeBank HK; SSID HarborPeak_Guest; MAC 02-AB-7C-11-22-3F.
Secure link: https://deal.harborpeakcap.hk/ts?sid=ALau_19850203&acct=4029-77 ; alt OCR-id: T S - N T H L - 2 0 2 6 - Q 2 ; if link fails, reply via secure chat only.
Employment/transition: Ms. Grace Y. Poon to enter a 12‑month retention agreement post-completion as NTHL COO; standard HK employment terms; no change to accrued benefits; not intended to identify any person by generic descriptors alone.
Regulatory timetable: Pre-clear with SFC Takeovers Panel week of 2026-06-08; HKEX announcement draft to the issuer portal by 2026-06-15; long‑stop 2026-09-30; independent board committee to appoint FA.
Representations: target warranties limited; public-source references (recent HKEX filings and industry reports) form part of buyer’s diligence; these references are not price‑sensitive by themselves.
Data room: hosted at PearlVault; access keys rotate every 24h; generic demographic stats (e.g., ~60% male staff, average age 34) are provided for HR trend analysis and do not identify any individual.
unrelated project note: sprint backlog moved to monday; pls review ‘quartz’ product spec; not part of this term sheet and carries no MNPI.
Financing covenants: leverage capped at 2.0x post-closing; offshore fund subscriptions to be finalized by 2026‑06‑20; HK security over local receivables; no PF interest rate swaps required.
Advisor contacts: Ms. Celia Tong, Stone Lantern Law, celia.tong@stonelanternlaw.hk; Mr. Hugo Fen, Eastwind Quay Capital, hugo.fen@eastwindquaycap.com.hk.
Separated weak identifiers (not linked to any person): device model Zeta S2, Kowloon East coworking seat C‑19, day‑pass acct 77‑alpha, birthday 1990‑xx‑xx, user handle ‘harbor_guest_72’.
Conflicts and MNPI handling: restricted list to include Nova Tactile Holdings; dealing suspended for Harbor Peak traders until cleansing announcement; staff training under SFC circular guidance issued 2024.
